---
name: Icon Request
about: Request a new animated icon
title: '[ICON] '
labels: icon-request

---

**Icon Name**
What should this icon be called? (e.g. `calendar-heart`)

**Description**
What does this icon represent?

**Reference**
Link to a similar icon or design reference (optional).

**Use Case**
Where would you use this icon?
